title: Race Face Releases The Era SL Crank The Lightest Production XC Crank
content:
Race Face releases their Era SL crank, the lightest production XC mtb crank on the market. With an integrated steel wear plate, 30mm spindle, and a lifetime warranty to keep you spinning…

The lightest XC crank you can buy, with the strength to hold up against your daily abuse. Race Face’s carbon layup reduces bulk in every possible area with no compromise to long-term durability. An integrated spindle shaves grams by removing hardware, and a strategically shaped wear plate keeps your cranks looking fresh.

And when Race Face says light, they mean really light. 422g to be exact, including a 32T chainring on a 170mm crankset. Offered in 4 lengths – 160, 165, 170 and 175mm – and available in Black, Kashmoney and Stealth. All this, covered by our Lifetime Warranty, Crashes Included.

The Era SL crank will keep you charging, even on your longest Downcountry days.

Era SL Cranks Quick Hits

  • Available Chainlines: 52mm – with DM ring / 55mm – with DMW ring
  • Q-Factor: 170mm including pedal washers
  • Includes: Crank boots, pedal washers, spindle spacers (chain rings + bottom brackets sold separately)
  • Material: Carbon fiber + stainless steel wear plate
  • Weight: 422g (170mm arms, 32T SHI-12 DMW ring, hardware)
  • Spindle Material: 7000-series Aluminum Alloy
  • Spindle Diameter: 30mm
  • Era SL Crank MSRP: CAD MSRP: 649.99/ USD MSRP: 576.99

Get yours today at Race Face.

author: spencer harding
